summary: Iteration 7 - Tested new 3-step enrollment flow (Participants → Verify → Pay) with per-participant attendance mode. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with booker section, participant forms with country/attendance_mode/notify fields, add/remove participant buttons, OTP verification, and payment summary with attendance mode badges.
critical_code_review_comments: 3-step enrollment flow properly implemented: Participants → Verify → Pay
Per-participant attendance_mode (online/offline) correctly persisted and displayed
Booker section has name, email, country fields - all working
Participant form includes: name, relationship, age, gender, country, attendance mode buttons, notify toggle with conditional email/phone
Add/remove participant buttons work correctly - can't remove if only 1 participant
Payment summary shows each participant with Zoom/Remote badge and per-person pricing
Mock OTP displayed on screen for testing (data-testid='mock-otp-display')

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 steps, participant forms, attendance mode, OTP flow working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing program ID 1 (Atomic Weight Release Program) - AED 729 base price
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enrollment flow is now 3 steps (previously 4). Attendance mode is per-participant, not global. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_enrollment_v2.py. Phone OTP is MOCKED - mock_otp returned in API response and displayed on frontend. VPN always detected in preview environment, so pricing defaults to AED. Key data-testids: booker-name, booker-email, booker-country, p-name-{i}, p-relation-{i}, p-age-{i}, p-gender-{i}, p-country-{i}, p-mode-online-{i}, p-mode-offline-{i}, p-notify-toggle-{i}, p-email-{i}, p-phone-{i}, add-participant-btn, remove-participant-{i}, step1-next, enroll-phone, send-otp-btn, enroll-otp, verify-otp-btn, mock-otp-display, pay-now-btn

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response (mock_otp field), displayed on frontend for testing

step_1_participants.booker_section: PASS - name, email, country fields render correctly
step_1_participants.participant_form_fields: PASS - name, relationship, age, gender, country, attendance mode (online/offline buttons), notify toggle, conditional email/phone
step_1_participants.remove_participant: PASS - removes participant, hidden when only 1
step_1_participants.attendance_mode_per_participant: PASS - each participant can select online (Zoom) or offline (Remote Healing) independently
step_1_participants.notify_toggle: PASS - shows email + phone fields when checked
step_1_participants.submit_to_api: PASS - POST /api/enrollment/start accepts all per-participant data

step_2_verify.phone_otp_send: PASS - Send OTP button works, mock OTP returned and displayed
step_2_verify.phone_otp_verify: PASS - correct OTP verifies, advances to Step 3
step_2_verify.mock_otp_display: PASS - displayed on screen for testing

step_3_pay.participant_list: PASS - shows each participant with name and attendance mode badge
step_3_pay.attendance_badges: PASS - Zoom badge for online, Remote badge for offline
step_3_pay.pay_button: PASS - shows total amount, Stripe checkout ready

backend_api.POST /api/enrollment/start: PASS - accepts booker_name, booker_email, booker_country, participants[] with country, attendance_mode, notify, email, phone
backend_api.GET /api/enrollment/{id}/pricing: PASS - returns participant_count, calculates total correctly
backend_api.GET /api/enrollment/{id}: PASS - returns all enrollment data including participants with attendance_mode
